title: Rapid temperature control unit
abstract: A thermal cycler comprises a flat sample container; a thin film heater, wherein the thin film heater is located on a side of the flat sample container; a thermo-electric cooler located adjacent to the thin film heater; a heat sink located adjacent to the thermo-electric cooler; and a thermal insulator, wherein the thermal insulator is located on a side of the flat sample container opposite the thin film heater, the thermo-electric cooler, and the heat sink.
